compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect ast-grep integration
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the ast-grep integration changes made across the epic.
**Why**: Ensures future agents and developers have accurate awareness of the ast-grep integration pattern, consistent naming conventions, and graceful degradation approach.
**Scope**:
- IN: Updates to any existing docs that reference code search patterns or exploration techniques, ensuring consistency with new ast-grep guidance
- OUT: Creating new documentation files, changes to code

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, all existing documentation that references code exploration or structural search is consistent with the ast-grep integration introduced by this epic
  ← Satisfies: "CLAUDE.md references sg as the preferred tool" (documentation consistency)

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Done definition update: Existing files that reference ast-grep (gate-2b-blast-radius.sh, fix-bug SKILL.md Gate 2b section, ADR-0003) are consistent with the naming and guard pattern established by story 0661-5114.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: fix-bug/SKILL.md (2 locations), ADR-0003, CLAUDE.md (removed forward-ref). Tests: N/A (docs-only).

comments.body: Fixed: Updated fix-bug SKILL.md Gate 2b notes, ADR-0003, and CLAUDE.md to consistently document ast-grep/sg naming convention
